title: Bucket List
description: Track the number of blocks you have looked at, for speedruns and stuff.
body:
(WIP)

**Depends on Fabric API, no other dependencies.**

Displays a tracking UI in the top-left corner of your screen. Every block you look at increases the counter. It is saved to the disk as persistent data, server-side. 

Look at ***all the blocks*** for a secret message.

Some blocks on the list may be unobtainable. The mod currently spams your log with every block on the list at startup. Some obvious ones are missing. Leave a comment with an unobtainable block that I haven't excluded from the list, and I'll get around to removing it eventually.

(Or adding a config file, but that takes a small bit of effort so don't expect it soon.)

Go forth and do “look at all the blocks” speedruns!
